src/libslic3r/PlaceholderParser*

# Direct config and flow helpers used by placeholder expansion
src/libslic3r/Config*
src/libslic3r/PrintConfig*
src/libslic3r/Flow*

tests/CMakeLists.txt

tests/libslic3r/config_tests_main.cpp
tests/libslic3r/test_placeholder_parser_smoke.cpp
tests/catch_main.hpp
tests/catch2/catch.hpp

# workflow changes should re-run the smoke gate
.github/placeholder-parser-smoke-paths.txt
.github/workflows/cpp_ut_smoke.yml
